{{Quote|These Beast Boys don't mess around-- a seeker-torpedo just left the ground!|Cay Qel-Droma|<ref name="Tales of the Jedi: Ulic Qel-Droma and the Beast Wars of Onderon">''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Ulic Qel-Droma and the Beast Wars of Onderon]]''</ref>}}
A '''seeker-torpedo''' was a type of ground-to-air [[Missile/Legends|missile]], used by the [[Beast Riders]] of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]].<ref name="Tales of the Jedi: Ulic Qel-Droma and the Beast Wars of Onderon" />

==Description==
Seeker-torpedoes launched from a six-barreled, swiveling emplacement. Missiles were fired singularly, and were capable of taking out [[Jedi Cruiser]]s and other [[Starship/Legends|starships]] as well. Thus, they offered protection from the occasional invasion attempt by the city-dwellers of Iziz. When fired, the missile capable of reaching at least a magnitude of six over the speed of sound.

==History==
Seeker-torpedoes were used by the [[Beast Riders]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], who stationed the turrets around the perimeter of their forest-stronghold.

==Appearances==
